agree_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our
forgot_password_desc: Enter your registered phone number. We will send an OTP to verify your identity.
forgot_password_subtitle: Verify your phone number to reset your password.
reset_success_desc: You can now log in with your new password.
about_cta_desc: From ceremonial matcha to seasonal handcrafted drinks — everything is waiting for you.
about_hero_desc: UjCha — where matcha meets mindfulness, and every sip is a moment made just for you.
about_story_p1: UjCha was born from a passion for matcha and the philosophy of handcrafted drinks. We don't just sell beverages — we create small rituals that help you reconnect with yourself amid the rush of daily life.
about_story_p2: From ceremonial grade matcha stone-ground by hand in the traditional way, to carefully curated seasonal drinks — everything at UjCha carries the care and love of the people who make it.
about_story_p3: We aim to build a space — both physical and digital — where you can slow down, savour, and find your own quiet moment. Every cup of tea is a reminder: be present.
value_curated_body: We only select ceremonial grade matcha from reputable tea regions, alongside fresh ingredients that are rigorously vetted.
value_handcraft_body: Every cup of matcha is stone-ground by hand using the traditional method, preserving the fullest flavour and natural nutrients.
value_handcraft_headline: Made by hand, given with heart
value_mindful_body: UjCha is built to remind you to slow down — to find stillness in a cup of tea in the middle of a busy day.
blog_desc: Brewing guides, brand stories and the latest news from UjCha.
check_back_later: Check back later for new content.
post_not_found_desc: This post may have been deleted or is not yet published.
address_note_placeholder: E.g. Blue gate at the front
address_placeholder: House number, street, ward, district, province
address_save_desc: Add an address to check out faster.
allow_location: Please allow location access when prompted.
allow_location_retry: Please grant location access in your browser and try again to order at the table.
already_submitted_desc:
You have already submitted feedback today. Each person can only submit once per day.
Come back tomorrow!
browser_no_location: Your browser does not support geolocation.

hero_subline: Handcrafted drinks from ceremonial grade stone-ground green tea — experience pure perfection in every sip.
host_pays_desc: One person pays everything — ideal for companies or families.
auto_discount_desc: Discounts applied automatically when locking the order — no code needed.
